raw_text:
80. Data -Driven Tooling Analyst

Job Summary  
Analyzes tooling and production data to improve efficiency, reduce downtime, and enhance 
decision -making.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Collect and analyze tooling performance data  
• Develop dashboards and reports  
• Identify trends and improvement opportunities  
• Support predictive maintenance strategies  
• Work with digital and production teams  
• Drive data -based decision -making  
Required Skills  
• Data analysis tools (Excel, Python, Power BI)  
• Understanding of manufacturing processes  
• Analytical thinking  
• Problem -solvi ng skills  
Qualification  
• B.E / B.Tech in Mechanical / Data Analytics  
Experience  
• 2–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹40,000 – ₹90,000 per month
